title: TGaceAllStories
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: ‘The world feels unpredictable’: I’m 56. My husband is 64. Our mortgage costs $17K a month. Do we pay it off?
items.description: “We paid $3.1 million for the house and owe $1.3 million on the loan.”

items.title: Why a 40-year Wall Street veteran is telling clients to sell everything American
items.description: Andy Constan says the rest of the world now offers more opportunities.

items.title: My small church wants to sell some property, but the trustees can’t agree on what to do with the money
items.description: Investing for an entity other than yourself can be tricky, especially if you’re doing it as a group.

items.title: ‘I have a moral and ethical conundrum’: My husband was killed by a careless driver. I received $2 million. What do I owe my stepdaughter?
items.description: “As the children grew, life became more complicated.”

items.title: Moderna got the FDA to change its mind and review its flu vaccine after some concessions
items.description: Moderna’s stock was surging after the FDA said it would review the biotech’s flu-vaccine candidate, a week after it had refused to do so.

items.title: Amazon is oversold. Traders can take advantage of the weakness using this options trade
items.description: Amazon's recent weakness appears to reflect sentiment fatigue rather than a deterioration in business quality.

items.title: Jefferies sees this online casino soaring more than 75%
items.description: The investment firm reiterated the online casino and sports betting company at a buy rating.

items.title: This software stock was hit hard on AI disruption fears. Now it’s proving detractors wrong
items.description: Analysts maintained their long-term bullishness on Cadence Design Systems, calling fears of AI disruption overblown.

items.title: Mizuho upgrades Palantir, says AI demand makes recent sell-off ‘unjustifiable’
items.description: Mizuho sees shares of Palantir rallying 47% from here.

items.title: Buy this AI infrastructure stock that has doubled in the past year, says Compass Point
items.description: The firm initiated the artificial intelligence infrastructure stock with a buy rating.
